spec_match.rationale: Explains that Chrome can preserve the installed shortcut only after the destination manifest, old-origin association, and migration prompt or force behavior complete, while origin-keyed storage such as IndexedDB, service workers, cookies, and passkeys still requires app-level handling.

interactive.rationale: Although mostly educational, it presents detailed storage tables, status badges, and concrete IndexedDB migration code so developers can map each persisted surface to a migration action.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers 12 distinct storage types, separates browser-preserved install state from origin-keyed data, and lays out concrete IndexedDB migration code patterns.

references.rationale: Properly points to the tracking ChromeStatus entry under see also.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful design employing neat status badges, grid cards, and elegant ivory summaries.
